productDisplayName: Peter England Men Printed Green TShirt
description: Composition Green T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry falt in shade Warm iron Add a dash of humour and brighten up your day with this T-shirt from peter england's Humour Rocks collection. With a hillarious health warning sitting snug on your belly, there's no better way to spread the cheer, while the soft cotton fabric offers you exemplary comfort.
